text: Court docs: Maxwell at MDC received replacement computer drive sent by SDNY prosecutors during pretrial confinement.
Flight log: Epstein aircraft traveled West Palm Beach → Teterboro → Santa Fe with unnamed passenger, Nov 1996.
BOP records: Epstein housed in SHU at MCC New York with captain and IDO video reviews to verify conditions.
Justin Nelson emailed Epstein after meeting him in person in Greenwich, November 2012
Associate Ramsey Elkholy asked if Epstein would be available in Palm Beach Gardens, June 2010
